hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '(engine|main)\.py'; then python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -6; fi 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qi 'test_'; then python -m pytest "$FILE" -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -10; fi 2>/dev/null || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qi 'requirements.txt'; then pip install -r requirements.txt -q 2>&1 | tail -3; fi 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '\.json$'; then python -c "import json; json.load(open('$FILE'))" 2>&1 && echo 'JSON valid' || echo 'JSON INVALID'; fi 2>/dev/null || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -6 && echo 'Tests passed — commit allowed' || echo 'TESTS FAILED — fix before committing'; fi 2>/dev/null || true
